brief: ALGOPOLIS: Higgsfield facade textures on 3D buildings + day/night lighting, verify & deploy

goals.title: Facade textures
goals.objective: Generate 4 facade textures (res/civ/ind/data) w/ lit windows; load as THREE map+emissiveMap on building boxes (white base when textured, flat fallback)
goals.evidence: 4 Higgsfield facade textures (res/civ/ind/data, lit windows) downloaded to assets/fac_*.png; loaded as THREE.Texture into TEX2; makeBuilding applies them as map+emissiveMap on building boxes (white base when textured, flat-color fallback). Day screenshot shows window/panel detail on grounded buildings. SYNTAX OK.

goals.title: Day/night lighting
goals.objective: Header sun/moon toggle shifts ambient/dir/fog/bg + window emissive glow; thriving/starved tint the glowing windows
goals.evidence: Day/night setNight(): AMB/DL/DL2+fog+#bg3d shift; building emissiveIntensity 0.16 day / 0.95 night, emiCol thriving teal / starved red / normal warm via emissiveMap = glowing windows; ☀/🌙 toggle + localStorage + ?night hook. Day & night screenshots distinct (even-lit vs dark-blue glowing windows).

goals.title: Verify & deploy
goals.objective: headless day+night screenshots show textured grounded buildings w/ glowing windows, no errors; deploy Higgsfield + push GitHub
goals.evidence: Deployed Higgsfield (game_id 99dcde78) + pushed GitHub 9d4ff39. Live night screenshot shows textured grounded buildings with glowing windows + dark-blue lighting + ☀/🌙 toggle. zip 7.46MB (facades 512px).
